description_long: This is a pair of modern, rectangular storage cabinets with a light wood finish on the front and a smooth, white finish on the sides and back. Each cabinet features two drawers, with the upper drawer being slightly smaller than the lower one, and both drawers are partially open in some views, revealing a white interior. The cabinets have clean, minimalist lines with no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The top edges are bordered with a thin yellow accent, adding a subtle touch of color. The construction appears to be primarily engineered wood or MDF with a laminate or veneer surface, and the drawers are likely mounted on metal runners. These cabinets are suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or residential entryways for organized storage.
description: A pair of modern, light wood and white storage cabinets with two drawers each, featuring minimalist design and yellow trim. The drawers are handleless and partially open, revealing white interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cabinets side by side, with the wood-finished drawer fronts and partially open drawers visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the white side panels and the full extension of both drawers on one cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain white backs and yellow trim, with drawers closed and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other cabinet's white side panels and both drawers fully extended.
